calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-02-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-02-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Ilene M. Hochstein, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Samuel Wong, who was placed under oath and examined.
Defendants Gordon Lam and Jeanne M. Lam were present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on January 14, 2009.
Settlement Agreement reached by the parties was placed on the record by Ms. Hochstein.

In accordance with the terms of the agreement, plaintiff Samuel Wong is entitled to Judgment for Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 782 7th Avenue, San Francisco, CA. Defendants Gordon Lam and Jeanne M. Lam shall vacate the subject premises no later than February 24, 2009 by 4:59 p.m.. Defendants shall return the keys to plaintiff and empty the premises of all personal possessions. Defendants are responsible for any lien put in place on the subject premises by Sunset Scavenger or any other utility. Each party agrees to a mutual release of all claims.

In return, plaintiff shall stay execution of the judgment through February 24, 2009, and plaintiff shall return $1,000.00 of defendants' $2,000.00 security deposit.

If defendants fail to vacate the premises as set forth above, defendants shall pay plaintiff the sum of $5,300.00 in past due rent, $44.38 per diem damages from February 1, 2009, and costs in the amount of $375.00.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than February 6, 2009.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ilene M. Hochstein for Samuel Wong, who is present
Elizabeth Meyer, Limited Scope Attorney, for Gordon Lam, who is present

Settlement conference held. Case not settled. Trial date of 2/2/09 is maintained.

JPT Irving Pfeffer, Clerk Melinka Jones, not reported. (218)
